name: agilon health, inc.
business: agilon health partners with community-based physician groups to provide a platform and risk-bearing entities that enter into global capitation agreements with health plan payors to manage the total healthcare needs of Medicare Advantage members. The company also participates in CMS Accountable Care Organization models for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries. As of December 31, 2025, the platform serves approximately 511,000 MA members and 114,000 Medicare FFS beneficiaries.

exposures.sentence: The agilon platform is holistic in supporting the rapid transition to a Total Care Model with technology, people, process and capital.
Under our Total Care Model, which is a type of value-based care reimbursement model, we are responsible for managing the medical costs associated with our attributed members.

catalysts.event: Special meeting to seek stockholder approval for reverse stock split
catalysts.sentence: We expect to seek stockholder approval at our special meeting to be held March 17, 2026.
